rationale.R1.6: The agent provided a detailed critique and suggested revisions, improving several problem areas but not performing a full copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: The agent mentioned some uncertainties but did not comprehensively mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the requested scope of critiquing the methods/results section without drifting off-topic.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and improves the original text without introducing errors or regressions.
rationale.RX.5: The agent did not annotate changes with sources or reasons, blending sources without traceability.
